name: training-developer
description: Design job-relevant training programs, workshops, onboarding paths, facilitator guides, labs, assessments, and reinforcement plans that build real capability instead of content inventory. Use when work involves curriculum design, enablement, skill-gap closure, onboarding, role-based learning paths, train-the-trainer materials, workshop planning, or converting subject-matter expertise into structured instruction. Do not use for one-off explanatory writing that does not need learning design.
